findings.message: The element is missing an alt attribute, making it inaccessible to screen readers. This violates WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).
findings.suggestion: Add a descriptive alt attribute, e.g. alt="Items catalogue banner". If the image is purely decorative, use alt="" to indicate that to assistive technologies.

raw_text: ```json [ { "path": "frontend/src/Items.tsx", "line": 30, "severity": "high", "message": "The element is missing an alt attribute, making it inaccessible to screen readers. This violates WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).", "suggestion": "Add a descriptive alt attribute, e.g. alt=\"Items catalogue banner\". If the image is purely decorative, use alt=\"\" to indicate that to assistive technologies." } ] ```
